chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.130 of 2020 along with High Court Appeal No.181 of 2020 Customs Today and another Versus Qasim International Container Terminal Pakistan Ltd., and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.742/2021 (contempt). 2. For hearing of CMA No.500/2021 (contempt). 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.1330/2020 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 28.02.2024 None present for appellants. Mr. Ahmed Shakir, Advocate for Respondent No.7. Ms. Sadia Bajwa, Advocate for Respondent No.8..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Since last few dates appellants’ counsel is not attending these matters. On 20.04.2021 Mr. Waseem, Advocate held Mr. Talha Makhdoom’s brief followed by his absence on 30.08.2022 and so also today and there is no intimation either. Both these appeals are dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Office to place a copy of this order in captioned connected appeal. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
